name: hover-card
description: A hover/focus-triggered preview card, CSS-only (Radix preview model: no ARIA role, aria-hidden, not focus-trapping). Anchors below the trigger with align (start/center/end) + sideOffset. Content lives in the DOM, revealed by group-hover/group-focus-within. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the hover-card partial to your JTE root at lievit/hover-card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.hover-card(trigger=@`...`, content=@`...`). Pass align/sideOffset to position the preview under the trigger. It is preview-only: keep the same info reachable in the page flow for assistive tech. The source is yours: edit freely.
